---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability for RawDrop
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## The problem

What you're trying to do and what gets in the way today. Describe the need, not a solution yet.

## What you'd want

The capability you wish existed, described as you'd use it. One clear ask.

## Why it matters

Who this helps and how often it comes up. What it unblocks.

## Alternatives you've tried

- Workaround you use now, and why it falls short.
- Another tool or approach you considered.

## Anything else

Mockups, links, examples, or related issues that make the ask concrete.
